hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */config.toml|config.toml) if [ -f "$f" ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"config.toml holds hand-managed secrets/infra — never overwrite an existing one. Only cp sample.config.toml when config.toml is absent."}}'; fi ;; esac; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(>|>>|tee |cp |mv )[^|;&]*config\.toml' && [ -f config.toml ]; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Refusing to overwrite existing config.toml (secrets/infra). Remove this guard intentionally if you really mean to."}}'; fi; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *CLAUDE.md) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","additionalContext":"Reserve CLAUDE.md for architecture/big-picture pointers only — no implementation minutiae (CSS classes, handlers, pixel constants). Match existing terse style."}}'; exit 0 ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */drizzle/*.sql|drizzle/*.sql|*/drizzle/meta/*|drizzle/meta/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"drizzle/ holds Drizzle-generated migrations — never hand-edit. Change src/lib/db/schema.ts then run npm run db:generate."}}' ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in */src/lib/db/schema.ts) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"After editing schema.ts, run npm run db:generate to emit the Drizzle migration (never hand-write files in drizzle/)."}}' ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) out=$(npx eslint "$f" 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "ESLint errors in $f — fix before continuing:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; fi ;; esac
